snippet.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 2 | Special Trailer | The Earth Kingdom | Netflix
snippet.description:
Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 debuts on June 25. Only on Netflix.

SUBSCRIBE: https://bit.ly/SlisTeaser

About SlisTeaser:
SlisTeaser create trailer mashups—also known as recut trailers—by combining scenes from one or more movies to craft new, imaginative trailers.
These fan-made edits often reimagine a film’s genre or storyline, offering a fresh perspective on familiar footage.
Due to their transformative nature, these mashups are protected under Fair Use as parody, adding creative spin and anticipation for fans and upcoming releases.

Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 2 | Special Trailer | The Earth Kingdom | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDDi11mkTjjmn4QoQkeKYaQ

What is Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 about?
Aang and his friends will venture farther into the Earth Kingdom, unlocking a deeper and more perilous chapter in their battle against the fearsome Fire Lord Ozai. On their journey, they enter the mysterious city of Ba Sing Se.

What new cast and characters will be introduced in Season 2?
Gordon Cormier (Aang), Kiawentiio (Katara), Ian Ousley (Sokka), Miya Cech (Toph), Maria Zhang (Suki), Elizabeth Yu (Azula), Dallas Liu (Zuko), Paul Sun-Hyung Lee (Iroh), Daniel Dae Kim (Fire Lord Ozai), Momona Tamada (Ty Lee), Thalia Tran (Mai), Sebastian Amoruso (Jet), Danny Pudi (The Mechanist), Lucian-River Chauhan (Teo), Terry Chen (Jeong Jeong), Dolly de Leon (Lo and Li), Lily Gao (Ursa), Madison (Hu Fei), Dichen Lachman (Yangchen), Chin Han (Long Feng), Hoa Xuande (Professor Zei), Justin Chien (King Kuei), Amanda Zhou (Joo Dee), Crystal Yu (Lady Beifong), Kelemete Misipeka (The Boulder), Lourdes Faberes (General Sung), Rekha Sharma (Amita)

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

snippet.title: The Cranberries - Zombie (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | The Cranberries
💿 Canción | Zombie
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 16/06/2009
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Rock

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"Zombie" de The Cranberries es una poderosa canción de protesta que habla sobre el dolor, la violencia y las heridas que dejan los conflictos armados en la sociedad. Con una letra cargada de emoción y una interpretación inolvidable de Dolores O'Riordan, el tema refleja el sufrimiento de las víctimas inocentes y cuestiona el ciclo interminable de odio y destrucción. Su mensaje sigue siendo tan impactante y relevante hoy como cuando fue lanzada.

📲 Sígue a "The Cranberries" en:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thecranberries/
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCb0vzLwvr7xbJgdqMzejDhw

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Verse 1]
Another head hangs lowly
Child is slowly taken
And the violence caused such silence
Who are we, mistaken?

[Pre-Chorus]
But you see, it's not me, it's not my family
In your head, in your head, they are fightin'
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are cryin'

[Chorus]
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head?
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie, oh

[Post-Chorus]
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo

[Verse 2]
Another mother's breakin'
Heart is takin' over
When the violence causes silence
We must be mistaken

[Pre-Chorus]
It's the same old theme, since 1916
In your head, in your head, they're still fightin'
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are dyin'

[Chorus]
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head?
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, eh-eh-oh, ya-ya

[Instrumental Outro]

#TheCranberries #Zombie

snippet.title: Gatto | Teaser Trailer | In Theaters March 5, 2027
snippet.description:
Ciao Gatto
Watch the new teaser for Disney & Pixar's #Gatto, arriving in theaters March 5, 2027

Mark Ruffalo (“Poor Things,” “The Avengers,” “Spotlight, “Foxcatcher”) has joined the voice cast as the scrappy black cat Nero, and Laurence Fishburne (“The Matrix” trilogy, “Boyz n the Hood,” “What's Love Got to Do with It”) will voice the ruthless mob boss cat Rocco. The teaser trailer introduces Nero and Rocco as they question another cat in a funny interrogation scene.
In “Gatto,” after years of maneuvering the canal-ridden, superstitious city of Venice, Italy, Nero begins to question whether he’s lived the right lives. Indebted to Rocco, the local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose—unless Venice gets the better of him first.
“Gatto” is directed by Enrico Casarosa and produced by Andrea Warren, the filmmaking team behind the Oscar®-nominated feature “Luca.” The new film releases exclusively in theaters March 5, 2027.

ABOUT PIXAR ANIMATION STUDIOS
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”

snippet.title: The Wandering Village: The Last Leviathan - Official Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
A new DLC introducing a massive amphibian creature, complete with new buildings, resources, a different tech tree and hours of fresh content. Launching alongside it is a big free update that deepens the interaction with both Onbu and the new creature, adding new body temperature and mood mechanics, cosmetics, as well as the brand-new Arctic Ocean biome.
The Wandering Village: The Last Leviathan will be available on PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2.

7IÈME CIEL

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/disques7iemeciel/
X : https://x.com/7iemeciel 
TikTok : https://www.tiktok.com/@disques7iemeciel

---------- 

CRÉDITS // RIEN NE SERA PLUS COMME AVANT

Production : Disques 7ième Ciel
Production exécutive / A&R : Steve Jolin

Interprété par : Souldia 
Composé par : Christophe Martin, Danny Ill 

Auteur : Kevin St-Laurent 
Compositeurs : Christophe Martin, Danny Robert Gilbert 

Réalisation : Christophe Martin
Co-réalisation : Kevin St-Laurent

Enregistrement : Christophe Martin
Mix : Christophe Martin
Mastering : Christophe Martin

Chargé de projet : Samuel Ricard
Gérance : Steve Jolin, Josée Fréchette
Artwork : Étienne Bossé / Bosslab Design

----------

PAROLES // RIEN NE SERA PLUS COMME AVANT

J’leur sors un banger maintenant qu’j’ai fini d’payer ma piscine
J’ai brisé ma destinée, j’ai défié les lois de la physique 
Panique pas 
Si tu me trouves écrasé sur le plancher d’la cuisine 
Ça voudra dire que j’aurai flanché sous le poids d’la critique 
Je maudit le jour où la musique est devenue d’la business 
Au final la famille reste la plus belle de mes richesses 
Fuller les Plaines d’Abraham, numéro 1 sur ma wishlist 
J’suis rentré dans l’industrie par la cave avec un pied d’biche 
J’prends d’la finesse, j’prends d’l’altitude et d’la vitesse 
J’en avais lourd sur le cœur, pardonnez mon impolitesse 
13e album, je reviens pour tout carboniser 
C’est l’art d’utiliser la violence sans la valoriser 
  
Fier 
Fier de moi 
Fier de mes frères 
J’ai juste besoin d’prendre un peu d’air 
J’aimerais bien boire un dernier verre 
Mais j’veux pas finir comme mon père 
Et si c’était à refaire 
J’referais tout de la même manière
 
Micro élevé
Encore sur le banc des penalty
Guess who’s back devine qui même si j’suis jamais parti 
Limoilou dans l’coeur et ça même depuis qu’j’ai quitté Bardy 
Pour que l’histoire reste ineffaçable fallait l’écrire au Sharpie 
Y’a que des bad luck
Donc faut penser à l’avance 
Sorti du matelas 
J’ai déposé mon money à la banque 
Veuillez pardonner mes manières extravagantes 
Je n’ai jamais changé mon accent juste pour plaire à la France 
On va jouer franc jeu 
J’aurai servi d’exemple pour les envieux 
Faire d’la musique c’est comme tomber en amour avec une danseuse 
Y’a d’la place pour tout le monde, des privilèges pour les plus chanceux 
Quand tu veux garder ton âme le prix du succès est dispendieux 
Passer mon message c’est comme shooter sans silencieux 
Dis-moi si je suis trop réaliste ou trop prétentieux 
Rapper c’est comme chanter la romance de tous les dangers 
Quand je voudrai mettre un terme à mes souffrances faudra m’débrancher 

Fier 
Fier de moi 
Fier de mes frères 
J’ai juste besoin d’prendre un peu d’air 
J’aimerais bien boire un dernier verre 
Mais j’veux pas finir comme mon père 
Et si c’était à refaire 
J’referais tout de la même manière

----------
